title.en: Latest ever winner, comeback and controversy - Senegal's remarkable exit
title.zh-CN: 最新的赢家、卷土重来和争议--塞内加尔引人注目的退出

summary.en: Late drama, controversy, history and heartbreak - the World Cup last-32 tie between Belgium and Senegal had everything.
summary.zh-CN: 晚期戏剧，争议，历史和心碎-比利时和塞内加尔之间的世界杯最后32平局拥有一切。

title.en: 'You can't catch your breath' - how will Azteca altitude impact England?
title.zh-CN: “你喘不过气来” -阿兹特克海拔将如何影响英格兰？

summary.en: BBC Sport explores how playing football at high altitude affects the body and mind as England prepare to visit Mexico and their fortress Azteca Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台（ BBC Sport ）探讨了英格兰准备访问墨西哥及其堡垒阿兹特克体育场（ Azteca Stadium ）时，高海拔踢足球如何影响身心。

title.en: World Cup dreams shattered as StubHub tickets cancelled at last minute
title.zh-CN: StubHub门票在最后一刻取消，世界杯梦想破灭

summary.en: Hundreds of fans who bought World Cup tickets on resale site StubHub say they have had them cancelled at the last minute.
summary.zh-CN: 在转售网站StubHub上购买世界杯门票的数百名球迷表示，他们在最后一刻取消了门票。

title.en: Gueye quits Senegal until coaching staff replaced
title.zh-CN: Gueye退出塞内加尔，直到教练组人员被替换

summary.en: Senegal midfielder Pape Gueye says he will be "taking a break" from playing for his country while the current management is in charge.
summary.zh-CN: 塞内加尔中场球员Pape Gueye表示，在现任管理层执教期间，他将“休息”为国家队效力。

title.en: Goalscorer Balogun sent off for USA

summary.en: USA forward Folarin Balogun is shown a straight red card for a challenge on Bosnia-Herzegovina's Tarik Muharemovic during their World Cup match.
summary.zh-CN: 美国前锋Folarin Balogun在世界杯比赛中为波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那的Tarik Muharemovic出示了一张红牌。

title.en: Why did England struggle against DR Congo - and what can they learn?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰为什么要与刚果民主共和国作斗争-他们能学到什么？

summary.en: A tactical analysis of England's victory over DR Congo - and what it might teach them for their next World Cup match against Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 对英格兰战胜刚果民主共和国的战术分析-以及它可能会教会他们下一场对阵墨西哥的世界杯比赛。

title.zh-CN: 伦敦城市女狮队签下德国前锋Anyomi

title.zh-CN: Balogun让美国在波斯尼亚获得应有的领先优势

title.en: Lopes will relish Messi duel, says Cape Verde defender's mother
title.zh-CN: 佛得角后卫的母亲说，洛佩斯会喜欢梅西的决斗

summary.en: The prospect of facing World Cup record goalscorer Lionel Messi in a knockout game would strike fear into most defenders, but not Roberto Lopes, according to the Cape Verde defender's mother.
summary.zh-CN: 根据佛得角后卫的母亲的说法，在淘汰赛中面对世界杯得分手莱昂内尔·梅西的前景可能会让大多数后卫感到恐惧，但不会让罗伯托·洛佩斯感到恐惧。
